touches.ai_summary: Sent LinkedIn connection request to Emma Weber with personalized note about rep productivity challenges in high-growth sales orgs. No response.
Follow-up LinkedIn message referencing BlueNetworks' recent Series B and scaling challenges. No response.
Cold email to Emma Weber highlighting how similar mid-market SaaS companies improved rep productivity by 40% with automation. No response.
Cold call attempt to Emma Weber. Left voicemail mentioning previous outreach and offering 15-minute discovery call. No callback.

Connected with Emma Weber on cold call. She mentioned recently joining as VP of Sales and inheriting a team struggling with manual processes. Expressed interest in learning more about automation for rep productivity. Agreed to schedule qualification call next week.

questions_asked.question: What's your biggest challenge right now with sales team performance?
questions_asked.answer: We have 28 reps doing a lot of manual data entry and follow-up tracking. I just started two months ago and need to show quick wins.

next_steps: Schedule 30-minute qualification call for next Tuesday

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email confirming qualification call and sharing case study of similar SaaS company that reduced admin time by 12 hours/week per rep. Emma replied confirming the meeting and asking about implementation timeline.

questions_asked.question: How long does typical implementation take for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 4-6 weeks with our standard onboarding program.

next_steps: Prepare discovery questions for qualification call

touches.ai_summary: Attempted check-in call before qualification meeting. Emma was in another meeting, left voicemail confirming tomorrow's call.

Qualification call with Emma Weber. Discussed current state: 28 reps spending 15+ hours/week on manual tasks, no centralized automation. Emma has Q2 budget and urgency to show ROI in first 90 days. Confirmed decision-makers include SVP Revenue Madison Young and IT Director Luke Friedman for technical review.

questions_asked.question: Who else needs to be involved in evaluating a solution like this?
questions_asked.answer: Madison Young, our SVP of Revenue, has final budget approval. Luke Friedman in IT will need to review integrations.

questions_asked.question: What's included in your automations package versus just the base platform?
questions_asked.answer: Base platform includes CRM enrichment and email automation. Automations Plus adds workflow builder, custom triggers, and Slack integration.

next_steps: Schedule discovery call to map current workflows
Send ROI calculator and pricing overview

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Emma Weber diving into specific use cases. Mapped out rep workflow: lead research (3 hrs/week), follow-up sequencing (4 hrs/week), data entry (5 hrs/week), meeting prep (3 hrs/week). Emma interested in automations_plus_consulting to ensure adoption. Mentioned she needs quick wins as new VP to build credibility with Madison.

questions_asked.question: Walk me through your reps' typical week—where are they spending time on non-selling activities?
questions_asked.answer: Lead research takes forever, follow-ups fall through cracks, and Salesforce updates eat up end of day. I'd estimate 15 hours a week on admin work.

questions_asked.question: Does the consulting package include ongoing support or just initial setup?
questions_asked.answer: Consulting includes 90-day change management support, custom workflow design, and dedicated success manager.

questions_asked.question: What does success look like for you in the first quarter?
questions_asked.answer: I need to show Madison that reps are hitting activity targets and spending more time selling. Measurable productivity gains.

next_steps: Prepare demo focused on workflow automation and reporting
Include consulting services in proposal
Loop in Madison Young for executive alignment

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email after discovery with custom demo recording showing BlueNetworks' specific use cases automated. Emma responded positively and introduced Madison Young for executive alignment. Mentioned budget discussion upcoming.

questions_asked.question: Can you send over a ballpark range for 28 seats with consulting?
questions_asked.answer: For 28 seats with Automations Plus and consulting, we're typically in the $28-32K ACV range depending on contract length.

next_steps: Schedule exec meeting with Madison Young
Prepare business case with ROI projections

touches.ai_summary: First exec meeting with Madison Young and Emma Weber. Madison focused on ROI, payback period, and implementation risk. Discussed how productivity gains translate to revenue impact. Madison supportive but cautious about timeline—wants to see this live by end of Q2. Asked about pricing flexibility given multi-year commitment.

questions_asked.question: What kind of ROI are your customers seeing in the first 90 days?
questions_asked.answer: Typical customers see 8-12 hours/week saved per rep within first 60 days, which translates to 20-30% more selling time.

questions_asked.question: How firm is the pricing for a two-year commitment?
questions_asked.answer: We have flexibility on multi-year deals. Let me work with my team on options for a 24-month contract.

questions_asked.question: Is end of Q2 a hard deadline for go-live?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we need this operational before Q3 planning. Emma's goals are tied to Q3 performance.

objections: Timeline is tight—concerned about implementation risk if we can't go live by June 30
next_steps: Provide detailed implementation timeline with milestones
Prepare multi-year pricing options
Schedule technical review with Luke Friedman

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up exec meeting with Madison Young to review proposal. Presented 24-month contract at $30,600 ACV (standard pricing). Madison pushed back on price, referenced budget constraints from recent hiring. Emma advocated for the consulting package to ensure adoption. Madison asked for better pricing to get deal approved.

questions_asked.question: What's your best price for a 24-month commitment? We're stretched after bringing on 12 new reps this quarter.
questions_asked.answer: Let me discuss with leadership. We want to make this work within your budget.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on seat count or package tier to hit a budget target?
questions_asked.answer: We need all 28 seats and the consulting is non-negotiable for Emma's timeline. But we need to land under $25K ACV.

objections: Budget is tight after Q1 hiring spree—need to sharpen the pencil on pricing
next_steps: Request discount approval for budget alignment
Confirm technical review completed
Target signed contract by end of week

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation meeting with Madison Young, Emma Weber, and Parker Adeyemi from procurement. Presented revised offer at $20,800 ACV (32% discount) for 24-month contract to meet budget constraints. Madison approved pricing pending legal and IT sign-off. Discussed payment terms and Q2 go-live commitment. Parker raised questions about MSA terms and data security.

questions_asked.question: Can we do annual payments instead of quarterly to reduce admin overhead?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can structure as annual payments with the same total contract value.

questions_asked.question: What's your SLA for implementation support during the 90-day consulting period?
questions_asked.answer: Dedicated success manager with 24-hour response time, weekly check-ins, and escalation path to engineering.

questions_asked.question: Are we aligned on June 30 go-live and pricing at $20,800 ACV?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, if legal approves the MSA and Luke confirms integration requirements, we can move forward.

objections: Need to review data processing terms in MSA before final approval
next_steps: Send MSA to Parker for legal review
Confirm technical requirements with Luke Friedman
Target signature by April 18

touches.ai_summary: Final negotiation call with Emma Weber to resolve last details. Legal approved MSA with minor redlines, Luke confirmed Salesforce integration requirements. Emma confirmed Madison's approval at $20,800 ACV. Discussed kickoff timeline and success metrics for first 90 days. Emma expressed confidence in partnership and urgency to start onboarding.

questions_asked.question: When can we start onboarding if we sign this week?
questions_asked.answer: We can kick off onboarding by April 21 and hit the June 30 go-live target with the accelerated timeline.

questions_asked.question: Any remaining blockers on your end before we finalize?
questions_asked.answer: No, we're good to go. Just need the final contract with the payment terms we discussed.

questions_asked.question: Will our success manager be assigned before kickoff?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we assign your dedicated CSM within 48 hours of contract signature to lead the kickoff call.

next_steps: Send final contract for signature
Schedule kickoff call for week of April 21
Assign dedicated success manager
